**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Xianchang Electric Power Parts Co., Ltd. is an authentic, active small-scale manufacturing enterprise specializing in automotive/marine power generator parts and precision hardware. The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been completely eradicated. Tracing its roots back to 1998 in Changzhou's Menghe Town (Xiaohe Town is the old name for Menghe, a famous auto parts hub in China), its physical parameters perfectly align with its operations: an 8 Million RMB paid-in capital and a stable workforce of 30 insured employees. The factory focuses on traditional, labor-intensive machining and assembly, including motors, vehicle/vessel power generator components, hardware tools, and plastic parts. Furthermore, its business scope explicitly retains the classic 'Sanlai Yibu' (Processing with supplied materials) export trade designation, highlighting its role as a specialized, export-oriented Tier-2/Tier-3 OEM parts manufacturer within the Changzhou industrial cluster.
